vipcbuilder.text:
May The Fourth be with you!  We at VI PC Builder and Games have been studying The Force, meditating and growing stronger.  Through that we have learned that we are able to unify those looking for Star Wars Games and the Games themselves with each other!  Reach out to us on your Comlink or through The Force (Email or Phone, you decide which is which) to see what we can get in for you!  Happy Star Wars Day and May The Force be with you!

Phone: 250-815-0443
Email: info@vipcbuilder.ca

 #StarWarsDay #starwarsunlimited #starwarslegions #starwarsshatterpoint  #localgamestore #lgs

Greetings Gamers!  Our event calendar for the June is up!

This month for any of you on the edge of jumping into the world of TCG's we have a learn to play day on the 6th starting at 11am kicking off with the Pokémon TCG until 1pm. Following that we will be education recently awakened Planeswalkers and slinging some spells in Magic: The Gathering until 3pm. Finally, choose your hero and slug it until the bitter end with the new classic Flesh and Blood until 5pm!

In Pokémon News this month we have a TBA event on the 13th and our usual ETB Battle on the 27th. 

It's a busy month for Planeswalkers this month in the world of Magic.  We have our Open the Archive Strixhaven Draft on the 7th, MTG's very own Pride event on the 14th where you can partner any two Legends, and MTG Marvel Super Heroes Prerelease weekend.

In the world of Rathe and Flesh and Blood we focusing our attention on Silver Age and ending the month with our Double Up Armory where you can win Armory and SAGE decks alike!

Game On!

 #fridaynightmagic #armorynight #FleshAndBloodTCG #lgs #pokemontcg #magicthegathering #pokémon

This weekend bring your Mother to our Pokémon Chaos Rising Prerelease!  For Mothers Day Mom's get $5 off to play in our Event! Already signed up? We will put $5 Store Credit on your account! 
Also we have Trade Day running so bring your binders to check what other collectors are bringing in store and maybe find your chase card! Flesh and Blood is Silver Age this weekend so get your commons and rares ready.

#mothersdaygift #mothersday #fridaynightmagic #armorynight #FleshAndBloodTCG #lgs #localgamestore #pokemontcg #pokémon

gamer_gear_direct.text:
Why Upgrade to a Racing Wheel?

A controller gets you around the track, but a racing wheel lets you feel every corner, curb, and correction. The difference isn't just speed; it's immersion, precision, and consistency, and once you experience force feedback, everything changes. 

Explore racing sim: https://gamergeardirect.com.au/

Fun fact: Many dedicated sim racers complete over 1,000 virtual laps before ever driving a new track competitively.

Practice doesn't make perfect—it makes confidence.

How many laps have you completed this month? 🏁

Think sim racing is just a game?

Drivers use simulators to train reflexes, build focus, and make faster decisions when every second counts.

Speed is the result. Training is the process.

ricmotech.text:
2026 Daytona 500 

Always a great time when we do events for FOX. . . 🦊

Late post but what an insane past couple weeks, here’s a few of our events from this past week and weekend, thanks to everyone for the support! We look forward to doing it again next year for F1 weekend at all the rooftops, restaurants, company parties (Guitar Hotel), and even at PGA for a little golf. From Brickell to Doral all points in between and of course the race track! Thanks again everyone! 🏎️

NEWS❗
Final Fantasy 7: Revelation coming spring 2027.

Square Enix has said that Final Fantasy VII Revelation will feature its most expansive open world yet which you'll able to explore aboard the Highwind, seamlessly skydiving from the airship to the world below. The entire planet serves as the stage for your adventure, Square Enix said. In addition to areas featured in previous entries, players can explore newly introduced regions, such as Mideel and Wutai.

pchome24h.text:
#PC有料 #PChome24h
今年618女神即刻應援！！
最頂的瑟七！最萌金世星！！
只有在PChome24等你呦～
​
邊購物邊有女神陪伴
還有機會得到女神小卡！
喔買嘎～還不來留言留爆它XDD
​
快來底下留言！
扌由 女神專屬小卡～
​
【抽獎活動辦法】
1️⃣ 追蹤PChome24h官方臉書+按讚該篇貼文
2️⃣ @兩位好友並對你喜歡的女神留下一句話
💬 範例：@__ @__，瑟七在哪我就在哪 or @__ @__，世星跳舞好好看
​
【活動時間】2026/6/2 ～ 2026/6/8
【獎項內容】
 > 瑟七或金世星個人小卡，各抽10名(隨機不指定)
​
【中獎通知】2026/6/12 於本篇貼文下方公佈得獎名單
​
⚠️️注意事項⚠️️
1️⃣ 每人限留言一次，重複留言不增加中獎機會
2️⃣ 得獎者需於公告後 3日內私訊粉專，逾期視同放棄�3️⃣ 本活動贈品僅限寄送台灣本島地區，離島中獎者將視為自動放棄兌獎資格，不另行補發。
4️⃣ 主辦單位保有最終解釋及活動調整權利
�本活動最終解釋權歸 PChome 24h 所有，若有變更將另行公告。
​
【618 折扣戰】
1. 全站最高回饋42%
2. 5/25-6/18 尋找BOXMAN拿神秘回饋12%
3. 5/25-5/31 ​ 早鳥限定送100P幣
4. 6月週週抽訂單100%回饋
5. 6/01-6/17 ​ 天天夜殺券最高折400
6. 6/18一日限定狂暴券折500
7. 6/18 ​ 新會員註冊享350
8. 玩遊戲最高拿618P幣
9. 滿額登記送活動女神應援卡(款式隨機)
​

nobaracingstore.text:
Ayer vivimos un momento que quedará grabado para siempre en la historia de Noba Racing Store. 🚀💛

Cumplimos el sueño de todo apasionado del automovilismo colombiano: ver a la leyenda @jpmonty2 , uno de los mejores pilotos de la historia, frente a frente… y aún más emocionante, verlo tomar el volante de nuestro simulador. 🏁✨

Pero la historia no terminó ahí. Gracias a la invitación de @podium_bc y a que @quimicolor_sas nos abrió las puertas de su casa, compartimos pista y sonrisas con @sebasmontoya58 , heredero del talento, la velocidad y la tenacidad que siguen llevando nuestra bandera a lo más alto de los podios del mundo. 🌎🏆

Gracias de corazón a @podium_bc y a @quimicolor_sas , patrocinador de Sebas, por hacer posible este encuentro soñado, que inspira a generaciones y enciende aún más nuestra pasión por el automovilismo.

Porque cuando la pasión por la velocidad nos une… no hay límites. 🏎💨

#nobaracingstore #juanpablomontoya #sebastiánmontoya #leyendasenlapista #simracingcolombia #pasiónporlavelocidad

🔥 Así van las 10 Horas de Ecuador 🇪🇨🏁

De lo virtual a lo real.
Del simulador a la pista.
Un sueño que hoy ruge a toda velocidad.

Orgullo total por nuestro piloto Noba Daniel Vélez, @danvel37 por atreverse a dar el salto y demostrar que la pasión con disciplina sí abre caminos.

Esto no es solo una carrera.
Es el comienzo de algo grande. 🔥🏎️🚀

🎮🔥 En Noba no solo vendemos simuladores…
Encendemos pasiones.

Ese instante en que tomas el volante, y todo desaparece…
La pista está frente a ti.
Tus reflejos, tu enfoque, tu pasión.
No es un juego… es vivir cada curva como si ya estuvieras ahí.

🏎️ En cada experiencia, en cada producto,
te acercamos un paso más a tu sueño de ser piloto.

⚡ Adrenalina real.
⚙️ Tecnología de alto nivel.
🏁 Emoción pura.

¿Estás listo para sentirlo?
¿Para dejar de imaginarlo y empezar a vivirlo?

🚀 Preventa exclusiva de Moza Racing.
Solo en Noba Racing Store.
Donde lo virtual deja de ser fantasía… y tu sueño de ser piloto empieza a ser realidad.

#simracing #mozaracing #sim #racing #moza #simrig #gamer #autos #simulator #racecars #driver #simulation

prosimtech.text:
Mais um evento da @xlgames.pt cheio de energia e diversão. No último fim de semana estivemos no Espaço Mitra em Lisboa para 4 dias da maior festa gaming em Portugal. Espreita um pouquinho da acção no nosso stand.

#simracing #gaming #wortengamingring #xlgames

O que dizem a esta personalização? 🔥

Muito em breve vais puder comprar a tua Baquet da nossa marca com uma personalização à tua medida. 

Esta ficou simplesmente linda. 😍😍

Um fim de semana com um ritmo frenético em Aveiro. O @xlgames.pt não desiludiu e trouxe-nos muita acção ao stand com variadíssimas corridas. 
Obrigado a todos que nos visitaram!!!

🇫🇷 SWIPE 👉 pour voir le F-GT Pro passer du mode Formule au mode GT en un temps record ! 🤯

Oubliez les outils et la prise de tête. Grâce aux ajustements instantanés Sim Easy Tool-Free, les modifications se font sans effort et en quelques secondes. 🔥

Un seul châssis pour tous les profils de pilotes. Invitez vos potes, réglez la position pour qu'elle s'adapte au millimètre près à leur gabarit, et retournez directement sur la piste ! 🏎️💨

Commande le tiens directement sur Simking.eu

🇺🇸🇬🇧 SWIPE 👉 to see the F-GT Pro switch from Formula to GT mode in record time! 🤯

Forget about tools and hassle. Thanks to the Sim Easy Tool-Free instant adjustments, changes are effortless and take only seconds. 🔥

One single chassis for every driver profile. Invite your friends over, adjust the position to perfectly match their size to the millimeter, and get right back on the track! 🏎️💨

Get yours on simking.eu

@nextlevelracing
#FGTPro #NextLevelRacing #Formula1 #GTRacing

Tester avant d’acheter ?

Nos experts vous accueillent sur rendez-vous dans un espace de 100 m² dédié au simracing et à la simulation de vol, dans notre showroom situé entre Aix-en-Provence et Marseille.

Sur place, on prend le temps d’échanger sur votre pratique, vos attentes et votre budget, puis on vous fait tester différentes configurations.

Simulateurs 3DOF et 4DOF, Direct Drive, pédaliers haut de gamme, cockpits et flight sim…
Vous testerez du matériel MOZA Racing, Heusinkveld et NextLevelRacing, Simrig, D-Box, Dof Reality... principalement sur PC.

📍 À proximité de Marseille
📆 Visites uniquement sur rendez-vous
💬 Intéressé(e) par une visite ? Dites-le en commentaire et partagez !

racegeareu.text:
Ukázka high-end SimRacingového rigu dodaného pod vánoční stromeček firmou @racegeareu r našemu velkému klientovi do Brna.

Jednalo se o kompletní profesionální stavbu od a do z. Od úvodních konzultací, přes detailní výběr komponent včetně počítače a monitoru, po složení, instalaci, dovoz, zapojení na místě a následný couching. Jednoduše řečeno all-incusive služba.

Na rigu byli použity pouze komponenty nejvyšší kvality, podrobný list níže:

Volantová základna - @simucube  2 Pro 
Pedály - @simucube aktivní pedály (plyn ve variantě Pro, brzda ve variantě Ultimate) 
Konstrukce kokpitu - @opggfi OverPower GT Pro verze včetně elektrického posuvu pedálu, držáku PC, klávesnice a myši
GT volanty - Karbonový @rexingsteeringwheels GT volant Timun & @simucube Tahko kulatý černý volant
Formulové volanty - @ascher.racing McLaren Artura Pro & @rexingsteeringwheels Mayaris 2
Sedačka včetně držáku a pojezdu -@sparco_official Evo L s příslušenstvím
PC - high-end s grafickou kartou Nvidia RTX4080 (počítáno s upgradem na RTX5090)
Hlavní monitor - Super ultrawide Samsung Neo 57 palců 240Hz
Dashboard monitor - Dell 27 palců 165Hz
Reproduktory pro diváky - SteelSeries Arena 3

Celá stavba byla mířená k simulaci různých modelů vozů Porsche. V tuto chvíli je to základ, který bude expandovat dál skrze velice zajímavé komponenty právě s tématikou Porsche.

Projekt byl náročný, ale také velice zábavný, posuďte stavbu alespoň na fotkách sami :). 

Presentation of high-end SimRacing rig delivered for Christmas by @racegear company to our big client to Brno city in Czech republic.

Setup with its components is visible above.

It was a complete design and build of the rig from a to z. From vision, over consultation to detail pick of all components including PC and monitor to actual build, installation, delivery, establishment with following couching. Simply said all-inclusive service.

It was demanding project, but real fun, you can review it at least from the photos yourself :).

Thanks for support!

#weneverstoplookingforgap #thisisourworld #simucube #racegeareu #simracing #simracinghardware #esport

Czech SimRacing Series 2025 - Grand Final in Prague: 𝐃𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐃𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐝

The Grand Final of the Czech SimRacing Series 2025 at the @praguecarfestival delivered extremely close racing, strong performances and a professional atmosphere across both categories – Czech National and International.
Thank you to all drivers for clean battles, discipline and a highly competitive level throughout the entire event.

Finals Results - 1st to 8th

1. David Tóth
2. Martin Tóth
3. Angelo Michel
4. Jan Haladej
5. Lukáš Přáda
6. Erwin Liszkowicz
7. Balazs Palla
8. Marcell Morocz

9th to 16th Semi Finals:

Kevin Aebi
Stebler Dylan
Samuel Foniok
František Kaštovský
Adam Vařeka
Gázser Gergő Marcell
Sergio Gurdiel Ferreiro
Adam Celárek

17th to 28th (Elimination Stage):

Drivers in this group advanced through a demanding Time Attack. The field was very close this year, and reaching the Top 28 required real consistency.

Milan Šádek
Oliver Gmuca
Lukáš Uhlík
Petr Hermoch
Mees Ketelaar
Jacopo Hrynečko
David Bieroš
Sophia Papáyová
Kristýna Dytrtová
František Vala
Lukáš Vysoký
Sebastian Bobek

𝐁𝐢𝐠 𝐓𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐤 𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐭𝐨 𝐎𝐮𝐫 𝐏𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐬:

@moza_racing_official – for providing the R12 Direct Drive bases and FSR 2.0 formula steering wheels
Křenek Motorsport & @racingfuel_simulators – for generous prizes and technical support
@simucube – for excellent prizes
@aditis_racing, @praguecarfestival and @racing.journal for their support and contribution
@opggfi 

Special Thanks – @pavel_fab, @autoklubcr & @fiawec_official

We extend our sincere appreciation to Autoklub České republiky and FIA for their guidance and support throughout the season. Their involvement helped ensure a professional, fair and internationally aligned competition.

Thanks to Organising Team

Our big thanks also go to everyone involved in the event’s execution: 
Organizators: @racegeareu
Commentators: @pavel_fab & @joshuax_cz 
Event directors: @martinsirotek_simracer & Josef Křenek
Technical staff: @petr_simecka & @matty.g.11
Stewards: @martiin_kadlecik & @fiala.vojtech
Production crew: @proesportcz & @lukas.redl
Media staff: @nkcsoka & @lukasv.raw

#CzechSimRacingSeries #Simracing #Motorsport #esport

🏁 Proud to be Official Distributor

We’re proud to announce that RaceGear is an official distributor of @bavariansimtec.

Their steering wheels represent absolute top-tier German engineering, precision and uncompromising quality — and we’re excited to bring them directly to our customers.

Including the brand new Delta Pro SC, the first fully wireless display wheel for Simucube 3 bases, a wide selection of Bavarian SimTec products is now available in our shop — with many models in stock and ready to ship.

🛒 Available at:
👉 https://www.racegear.eu

Thank you to @bavariansimtec  for the trust. Looking forward to a strong partnership. 🤝

#RaceGear #BavarianSimTec #SimRacing #OfficialDistributor #GermanEngineering

focussimracing.text:
FSR One Twenty.

Built for higher loads, increased rigidity, and precise adjustability.

Oversized 40×120 structural extrusion paired with CNC-machined connection points creates a chassis designed to minimize flex and maximize consistency.

CNC-indexed upright adjustment and a notched pedal system make dialing in your position simple and repeatable.

Every detail is engineered with purpose.

Built in California.

#simracing #simrig #losangeles
